name: The Bradford National Bank Of Greenville
description_short: Community bank founded in 1867 offering personal checking, savings, business accounts, loans, and wealth management across Illinois locations.
description_long: Bradford National Bank has operated as a community bank since its founding in 1867, maintaining a regional presence across Bond, Madison, and Washington counties in Illinois with locations in Greenville, Highland, Marine, Nashville, Irvington, Centralia, and Breese. The bank combines traditional personal service with modern financial products, positioning itself explicitly as "A Real Community Bank" where customers expect to reach familiar staff members rather than call centers. The bank serves individuals, small businesses, agricultural clients, and students through a comprehensive suite of services including deposit accounts, lending products, cards, and wealth management tools. What distinguishes Bradford National Bank is its emphasis on local relationship banking and personalized service, with a quote from leadership stating "If you call Bradford we are going to answer and it's going to be that friend or neighbor you know and trust." The bank offers specialized programs including a Travel Club for customers 50 and older, student scholarships, agricultural market reporting, and business dream-maker financing programs. Bradford National Bank delivers the full range of services expected from a traditional community bank, though as a regional institution serving primarily Illinois markets, customers outside these areas would need to evaluate accessibility and whether their nearest branch is convenient. Many banks offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.
services: Personal savings accounts and IRA accounts
Business checking accounts with ACH origination and direct deposits
Personal credit cards and debit cards
Business credit cards and debit cards
Mobile banking app with Zelle integration and mobile pay
Agricultural banking services and market reporting portal
pros: Founded in 1867 with over 150 years of operational history and community presence
Multiple convenient locations across three Illinois counties (7 branch locations listed)
Free checking accounts available with no mention of monthly fees
ClickSWITCH service automates account switching, direct deposits, and payment transfers instantly
Specialized programs including Travel Club for seniors, student loans with scholarships, and agricultural services
Mobile banking app with bill pay, transfers, and account checking capabilities
Wealth management portal and agricultural portal with market reports and news
Zelle integration for peer-to-peer payments included in personal banking
cons: Limited to Illinois service area (Bond, Madison, Washington counties) — geographic constraint for customers outside region
Website lacks specific information on CD rates, APYs, loan rates, and fee structures
No mention of online-only account opening process or details on account minimum balance requirements
Mobile banking and online services appear basic compared to larger national banks with more feature-rich apps
Limited information about business loan products, approval timelines, or SBA lending programs
best_for: Illinois residents in Bond, Madison, and Washington counties seeking personalized relationship banking
Small business owners and agricultural clients wanting community-focused lending and local decision-making
Customers aged 50+ interested in senior-specific programs like the Travel Club and community events
Students needing educational financing and scholarship opportunities with local support
diagnosis: Bradford National Bank is best for Illinois residents and business owners in its three-county service area who prioritize local relationship banking and personalized customer service over digital convenience. The main caveat is geographic limitation — customers outside Bond, Madison, and Washington counties cannot easily access branches or may not qualify for services, and the bank's website lacks transparent pricing and product details needed for rate shopping.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
fdic_official_name: The Bradford National Bank of Greenville
